race.description: The Agency, Katrina Garwood & Ian Mccallum Hcp
race.comment: Competitive. AZONTO (5) resumed with a narrow defeat here over 1200m and has more to give. Maps for the run of the race and Newitt replaces the 2kg apprentice. Has been briefly freshened and will go close. WEDNESDAY'S BOSS (11) jumped favourite in the same contest and was plain after settling back. Posted a strong number winning first-up and she has a 2kg claim today. She's up to this and is worth another chance. MAKE A DECISION (2) was outgraded behind Mazzini last time off two wins in stronger than this. He's capable of using the inside barrier to advantage and the 2kg claim brings him into it. GOLDEN MEADOW (6) just missed in a 68 at Hobart, spiking her numbers. Has a handy gate and a 2kg allowance and will be fitter again. She has claims as well.
